The '''Enser Flay 254''' was a formidable [[Podracer/Legends|podracer]] that was manufactured sometime near the end of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The pod was unique in that the [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpit]] was a contained bubble that maintained water so that a marine species could pilot the craft. The only known pilot of an Enser Flay 254 was the [[Neelabi (species)|Neelabi]] podracer, [[Occo Ninebar]].
